page_content:
Prerequisite: PHYS751 and PHYS624.

PHYS758 Seminar in Elementary Particles and Quantum Field Theory (1 Credit)

PHYS759 Seminar in Elementary Particles and Quantum Field Theory (1 Credit)

PHYS761 Plasma Physics I: Survey (3 Credits)

A detailed study of plasma physics. The first semester treats particle orbit theory, magnetohydrodynamics, plasma waves, and transport phenomena.
